rose_gold_ring.title: Craft a Rose Gold Ring (MCA Reborn) — required for the marriage system, Rose Gold = Gold + Copper alloy

village_reputation.title: Reach positive village reputation with at least 2 villages (MCA Reborn council + gift system)

subtitle.text: MCA Reborn gives villagers personality, relationships, and needs. The village council is the game within the game.

description: CH.15 · THE COUNCIL
▸ MCA Reborn (My Character Arcane) replaces vanilla villager AI
with named villagers that have personalities, skills, and relationships.
They can be befriended, gifted, married.
The village has a council system for community decisions.
Ch15 is the homecoming chapter — you return to the community
you left when you entered the End.
◈ MCA REBORN CORE SYSTEMS
└ Named villagers: each has a name, profession, personality
Interact to build relationship over time
└ Gift system: give items to increase relationship score
Higher relationship = better trades + unique dialogue
└ Village reputation: all villagers contribute to reputation
High reputation = council approval + protection from attacks
└ Council: village decision-making body
Complete council tasks for reputation gains and rewards
◈ ROSE GOLD RING
└ Rose Gold = crafted from Gold + Copper (MCA Reborn recipe)
Check JEI for mca: or mca_reborn: ring recipe
└ Rose Gold Ring: required item to initiate marriage proposal
└ Marriage: permanent companion NPC, follows player, provides buffs
└ MCA companion buffs: varies by partner's profession/skills
└ Marriage is optional — the Ring crafting quest is milestone
(symbolic: you have built enough to consider permanence)
◈ VILLAGE COUNCIL TASKS
└ Council quests: given by council NPC in village
└ Types: supply delivery, protection, exploration, crafting
└ Completion: reputation increase + Numismatics rewards
└ Priority targets: villages with Bountiful board + MCA council
(stacking task types = maximum efficiency per village visit)
▸ The village was here while you were in the End.
The council met without you.
The villagers had seasons without you.
You return with dragon food and Shulker Boxes
and they look at you and ask:
where have you been?
The answer is 14 chapters.
The village just wants to know you are back.
▶ Craft a Rose Gold Ring (MCA Reborn) [check]
▶ Reach positive reputation with 2 villages [check]
◇ MCA Reborn marriage companion benefits:
the companion can be assigned a home,
will defend it, and provides daily resource gifts.
The resource type depends on their profession.
Marry a farmer for passive food. A blacksmith for materials.
Choose based on what your Ch16 supply chain needs.
